animation.init: Initialize {{N}}x{{N}} board, start finding solutions from Row 0.
animation.check_safe: Attempt to place a Queen at Row {{row}}, Col {{col}}
animation.attacked: Position ({{row}}, {{col}}) is under attack, cannot be placed!
animation.place_queen: Position ({{row}}, {{col}}) is safe, placing the Queen!
animation.backtrack: Backtrack from Row {{row}}, removing Queen at ({{prevRow}}, {{prevCol}}) to find the next position
animation.success: Successfully placed Queens on all rows, found a solution!
animation.fail: Exhausted all possibilities, no solution exists for {{N}}x{{N}} board!

ui.limitWarning: Values of N > 8 take too long to compute and animate. Please enter a number between 1 and 8.
ui.invalidInput: Please enter a valid board size N (integer > 0)
